dict.string: Vision|Pipe uses System Events to read the active application and window title so it can include that context as metadata in your captures.
Vision|Pipe captures screenshots of the screen region you select so you can annotate them and paste them into any LLM.
Vision|Pipe uses Accessibility access so the ⌘⇧C global keyboard shortcut can trigger captures from anywhere on your Mac.
Vision|Pipe uses the microphone to record voice notes that are transcribed and attached to your screenshots.
Vision|Pipe uses speech recognition to transcribe voice notes attached to your screenshots. All processing happens on-device.
